description_zh: 神照自己的樣式所造的第一個人。
description_en: The first man, made by God in His own image.
visual_prompt: a kind young man with short dark curly hair, warm tan skin tone, gentle friendly smile, simple modest clothing made of soft leaves or plain fabric, children's storybook illustration style
appearance_notes: 服裝簡樸、符合兒童內容分級，各 scene 維持相同髮型、膚色與服裝樣式以確保角色一致性
